note: LAM special case (pos==1) restricted to alef wasla (U+0671) only. إلّا (664) reclassified as true_doubling (indivisible particle). ألّا (49) reclassified as noon_assimilation (أَنْ + لَا contraction). Same-word noon+shadda restored to noon_assimilation. Tanween treated as shadow noon per project framework (§2.7).
